import re

with open\('pages/manual.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

def bump\(m\):
    val = float\(m.group\(1\)\)
    new = val + 2
    return 'font-size:' + \(str\(int\(new\)\) if new == int\(new\) else str\(new\)\) + 'px'

result = re.sub\(r'font-size:\([\\d.]+\)px', bump, content\)

with open\('pages/manual.html', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(result\)

matches = re.findall\(r'font-size:\([\\d.]+\)px', result\)
print\('변경 완료:', len\(matches\), '개 선언'\)
print\('샘플 크기들:', sorted\(set\(float\(x\) for x in matches\)\)[:12]\)
")

    content = f.read\(\)

    new = val + 2
    return 'font-size:' + \(str\(int\(new\)\) if new == int\(new\) else str\(new\)\) + 'px'

result = re.sub\(r'font-size:\([\\d.]+\)px', bump, content\)

with open\('pages/06-refinement.html', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(result\)

matches = re.findall\(r'font-size:\([\\d.]+\)px', result\)

print\('샘플 크기들:', sorted\(set\(float\(x\) for x in matches\)\)[:15]\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import json, urllib.request, urllib.error, sys

SUPABASE_URL = 'https://haxcktfnuudlqciyljtp.supabase.co'
ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImhheGNrdGZudXVkbHFjaXlsanRwIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NjkzMDUwNDAsImV4cCI6MjA4NDg4MTA0MH0.suN7BeaHx3MjaNlMDQa0940P-rMl2XPyk4ksoQEU3YM'

with open\('C:/01 Claude-Code/10 Vibe Coding OS/theme.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

payload = json.dumps\({
    'id': 'theme-color-design',
    'name': '/theme-color-design -- Theme Color Design',
    'description': 'Brand color palette, dark/light theme, CSS variables \(WCAG\)',
    'content': content,
    'category': 'P1'
}, ensure_ascii=False\).encode\('utf-8'\)

req = urllib.request.Request\(
    SUPABASE_URL + '/rest/v1/skills',
    data=payload,
    headers={
        'apikey': ANON_KEY,
        'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + ANON_KEY,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
        'Prefer': 'return=representation'
    },
    method='POST'
\)

try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=15\) as resp:
        print\('OK', resp.status\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\('ERR', e.code, e.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)[:300]\)
" 2>&1)

}, ensure_ascii=False\).encode\('utf-8'\)

Bash(cd "C:/01 Claude-Code/10 Vibe Coding OS" && python -c "
import json, urllib.request, urllib.error

SUPABASE_URL = 'https://haxcktfnuudlqciyljtp.supabase.co'
SUPABASE_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImhheGNrdGZudXVkbHFjaXlsanRwIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NDA5OTYyMDksImV4cCI6MjA1NjU3MjIwOX0.GHygnuE7KVBmkDjkn6-RFk5JHBL_suN7BeaHx3MjaNlMDQa0940P-rMl2XPyk4ksoQEU3YM'

with open\('chat.md', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

data = json.dumps\({'id':'chat-ui-builder','content':content,'name':'/chat-ui-builder','phase':'P1'}, ensure_ascii=False\).encode\('utf-8'\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(
    f'{SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/skills',
    data=data,
    headers={
        'apikey': SUPABASE_KEY,
        'Authorization': f'Bearer {SUPABASE_KEY}',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
        'Prefer': 'return=minimal'
    },
    method='POST'
\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as r:
        print\('Created:', r.status\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    body = e.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    if e.code == 409:
        data2 = json.dumps\({'content':content}, ensure_ascii=False\).encode\('utf-8'\)
        req2 = urllib.request.Request\(
            f'{SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/skills?id=eq.chat-ui-builder',
            data=data2,
            headers={
                'apikey': SUPABASE_KEY,
                'Authorization': f'Bearer {SUPABASE_KEY}',
                'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
                'Prefer': 'return=minimal'
            },
            method='PATCH'
        \)
        with urllib.request.urlopen\(req2\) as r2:
            print\('Updated:', r2.status\)
    else:
        print\('Error:', e.code, body\)
")
